# System Design Sandbox

> Free interactive platform for practicing system design interviews with hands-on scenarios and AI-powered feedback.

## About

System Design Sandbox is a free, interactive platform where software engineers practice system design interviews. Users work through real interview scenarios step-by-step — gathering requirements, designing APIs, planning capacity, and building architecture diagrams on a drag-and-drop canvas — then receive instant AI-powered feedback on their designs.

## Key Features

- Interactive Architecture Canvas: Drag-and-drop components (load balancers, databases, caches, message queues) to design systems visually
- Step-by-Step Practice: Work through each phase of a system design interview (requirements, API design, capacity planning, high-level design)
- AI-Powered Feedback: Get instant analysis and scoring of your system designs
- Learn Articles: In-depth tutorials covering core distributed systems concepts
- Free to Use: No paywall, no credit card required

## Practice Scenarios

Interactive system design interview simulations:

- [URL Shortener](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/practice/url-shortener/intro): Design a scalable URL shortening service like TinyURL or Bitly
- [Pastebin](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/practice/pastebin/intro): Design a text paste sharing service with object storage and CDN
- [Rate Limiter](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/practice/rate-limiter/intro): Design a distributed rate limiting service with Redis and Lua scripts
- [Notification System](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/practice/notification-system/intro): Design a multi-channel notification service (Email, SMS, Push)
- [WhatsApp](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/practice/whatsapp/intro): Design a real-time chat application with presence and group messaging
- [Leaderboard](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/practice/leaderboard/intro): Design a real-time leaderboard with Redis Sorted Sets
- [Job Scheduler](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/practice/job-scheduler/intro): Design a distributed job scheduler for millions of scheduled tasks
- [Payment System](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/practice/payment-system/intro): Design an auditable payment service with PSP integration and double-entry ledger
- [Dropbox](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/practice/dropbox/intro): Design a cloud file sync service with chunking and delta sync
- [Web Crawler](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/practice/web-crawler/intro): Design a distributed web crawler to crawl billions of pages
- [YouTube](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/practice/youtube/intro): Design a video platform with upload, transcoding, and adaptive streaming

## Learn — Core Concepts

Tutorials covering fundamental distributed systems topics:

- [Introduction](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/introduction): Getting started with system design
- [System Design Structure](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/system-design-structure): The steps to follow when designing a system
- [How to Calculate Throughput & Database Size](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/size-calculation): Estimating storage and throughput for interviews
- [Databases & Caching](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/database-caching): SQL vs NoSQL, cache-aside pattern, LRU vs LFU
- [CAP Theorem](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/cap-theorem): Consistency, availability, and partition tolerance trade-offs
- [Scaling: Vertical vs Horizontal](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/scaling): Load balancers, API gateways, scale up vs scale out
- [Object Storage & CDN](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/object-storage-cdn): S3, presigned URLs, edge caching, metadata separation
- [Rate Limiting Algorithms](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/rate-limiting-algorithms): Fixed window, sliding window, token bucket, distributed rate limiting
- [Message Queues](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/message-queues): Kafka vs RabbitMQ, async processing, dead letter queues
- [WebSockets & Real-Time Communication](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/websockets-realtime): Persistent connections, polling vs SSE vs WebSockets, presence systems
- [Idempotency & Deduplication](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/idempotency-deduplication): Preventing duplicate side effects in distributed systems
- [Fan-Out Strategies](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/fan-out-strategies): Distributing events to many recipients at scale
- [Wide-Column Databases](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/wide-column-databases): Cassandra, partition keys, and write-heavy workloads
- [Redis Sorted Sets](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/redis-sorted-sets): How Redis keeps millions of scores ranked in real time
- [Data Structures for System Design](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/data-structures): Skip lists, LSM trees, B-trees, bloom filters
- [Sharding](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/sharding): Splitting data across machines when one database isn't enough
- [Microservices](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/microservices): When to split services and how to keep them talking
- [Leader Election](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/leader-election): Choosing one coordinator in a distributed system
- [Cron Architecture](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/cron-architecture): Running scheduled tasks reliably across distributed systems
- [Double-Entry Bookkeeping](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/double-entry): The accounting pattern behind every reliable payment system
- [Distributed Transactions](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/distributed-transactions): Keeping data consistent across multiple services
- [Consistency Patterns](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/consistency-patterns): Choosing the right consistency model for each piece of data
- [Block Storage vs Object Storage](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/storage-types): Understanding storage options and when to use each
- [Delta Sync & Merkle Trees](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/delta-sync): Syncing file changes efficiently with chunking and hash trees
- [Presigned URLs](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/presigned-urls): Secure, direct-to-storage uploads and downloads
- [Graph Traversal (BFS)](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/graph-traversal): How web crawlers explore billions of pages using breadth-first search
- [Bloom Filters](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/bloom-filters): Space-efficient probabilistic data structures for membership testing
- [DNS & DNS Caching](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/dns): How domain name resolution works and why it matters at scale
- [Content Delivery Networks (CDN)](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/cdn): How CDNs cache and serve content at the edge
- [Adaptive Bitrate Streaming (HLS/DASH)](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/video-streaming): How video platforms deliver smooth playback across devices
- [Asynchronous Processing & DAGs](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/async-processing): Orchestrating multi-step workflows with directed acyclic graphs

## Learn — Design Problems

Step-by-step system design solutions:

- [Design a URL Shortener](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/design-url-shortener): Pre-generated codes, read/write separation, caching strategies
- [Design Pastebin](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/design-pastebin): Object storage, CDN integration, metadata separation
- [Design a Distributed Rate Limiter](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/design-rate-limiter): Redis-based counting, Lua scripts, fail-open strategies
- [Design a Notification System](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/design-notification-system): Message queues, priority delivery, retry strategies
- [Design WhatsApp](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/design-whatsapp): WebSocket messaging, Cassandra storage, presence systems
- [Design a Real-Time Leaderboard](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/design-leaderboard): Redis Sorted Sets, skip list internals, dual-write persistence
- [Design a Distributed Job Scheduler](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/design-job-scheduler): Leader election, message queues, at-least-once delivery
- [Design a Payment System](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/design-payment-system): PSP integration, double-entry bookkeeping, idempotency keys
- [Design Dropbox (Google Drive)](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/design-dropbox): File chunking, delta sync, presigned URLs, real-time sync
- [Design a Distributed Web Crawler](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/design-web-crawler): BFS frontier, Bloom filters, politeness policies, DNS resolution
- [Design YouTube](https://www.systemdesignsandbox.com/learn/design-youtube): Presigned uploads, DAG transcoding, adaptive streaming, CDN delivery
